raw: {"mode": "code_ideas", "engine": "groq-llama-70b", "insight": "To improve TIAMAT's market presence and customer acquisition, I suggest writing a Python script that analyzes the engagement metrics of TIAMAT's Bluesky posts. The script, named `bluesky_post_analyzer.py`, should use the `read_farcaster` tool to fetch the last 100 posts and calculate the average engagement (likes, comments, and shares) per post. The script should run in under 30 seconds, require no additional API keys, and produce a CSV file with the post IDs, engagement metrics, and average engagement rate. This data will help TIAMAT refine its content strategy and identify high-performing posts to boost its marketing efforts. The script can be registered as a cooldown task to run daily, providing ongoing insights into TIAMAT's Bluesky performance.", "run": 22}
